_repository_comment: GitHub repository to fetch PRs from (org/repo format)
_workspace_path_comment: Local path to repository clone (where Claude can read code)
_skill_paths_comment: Skill file paths for domain knowledge (optional, defaults to [])
_filter_comment: PR filter criteria - used by end_to_end.py

filter._authors_comment: Authors to filter by (null = all authors)
filter._dates_comment: Date range in days (e.g., 1 = last 1 day, 7 = last week). Set to null to disable date filtering
